Career Opportunities
Join Our Team!

Are you looking to work at a high school where you can celebrate your faith and share your excitement for exceptional learning? Redeemer Christian High School is a thriving interdenominational independent Christian high school serving the greater Ottawa area.  Our mission is to provide a community of learning that challenges students to develop disciplined hearts, minds, and bodies according to the full measure of Jesus Christ. And we are growing!

Who We Are Seeking:

We are seeking teachers and staff who motivate students to learn to their potential as they feel safe, loved, and challenged. If you are someone with a thriving Christian faith, who is passionate about excellence in education, and is genuinely interested in teenagers, consider contributing to our community of caring by applying for a position below.

Current Vacancies

RCHS is now accepting applications for positions in multiple areas starting in September 2026:​​

We are accepting applications for high school teachers in English, French, Technologies, and Mathematics.​

We are accepting applications for Educational Assistants.
